# **\--Vraki Language--**

The Common language inherited from Finaies.

Because of Buhraies bringing English-speaking humans into the mix, but removing the language aspect. However, not everything was removed, so over time, when humans took over, the fundamental basis of creating an alphabet stuck around, and the order in which words were placed in such an alphabet was naturally the same as in English.

It is mostly English, with a skin, since English is the common language for business communication and the language Deo used to write everything.  
Old Vraki is old English, but with some random stuff thrown in.  
![][image1]  
**The example above translates to Nari (N is uppercase)**

# **Alphabet**

| a | b | c | d | e | f |
| ----- | ----- | ----- | ----- | ----- | ----- |
| ![][image2] | ![][image3] | ![][image4] | ![][image5] | ![][image6] | ![][image7] |
| **g** | **h** | **i** | **j** | **k** | **l** |
| ![][image8] | ![][image9] | ![][image10] | ![][image11] | ![][image12] | ![][image13] |
| **m** | **n** | **o** | **p** | **q** | **r** |
| ![][image14] | ![][image15] | ![][image16] | ![][image17] | ![][image18] | ![][image19] |
| **s** | **t** | **u** | **v** | **w** | **x** |
| ![][image20] | ![][image21] | ![][image22] | ![][image23] | ![][image24] | ![][image25] |
| **y** | **z** |  | **B** |  |  |
| ![][image26] | ![][image27] |  | ![][image28] |  |  |

# 

# **Numerals**

| 0 | 0 (alt) | 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 |
| ----- | ----- | ----- | ----- | ----- | ----- |
| ![][image29] | ![][image30] | ![][image31] | ![][image32] | ![][image33] | ![][image34] |
| **5** | **6** | **7** | **8** | **9** | **10\*** |
| ![][image35] | ![][image36] | ![][image37] | ![][image38] | ![][image39] | ![][image40] |

\*Connecting numbers must have a pipe

# 

# **Misc**

| Space | . | , | \! | ? | / |
| ----- | ----- | ----- | ----- | ----- | ----- |
| ![][image41] | ![][image42] | ![][image43] | ![][image44] | ![][image45] | ![][image46] |
| **\\** | **\+** | **\-** | **\*** | % |  |
| ![][image47] | ![][image48] | ![][image48] | ![][image49] | ![][image49] |  |

# 

# **\--Finaies Interface Language--**

A Logographic Language that evolved over time

# **Element**

The target of Soul Energy. See [Soul Energy Interfaces](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1TT6vrtFEBw978eQbAbDNOt_WKXqYurn7)

# 

# 

# **\--Buhraies Interface Language--**

A Logographic Language that expanded from Finaies Interface due to the Blood & Soul Energy mix.

# **Target**

The body part target of Soul Energy. See [Soul Energy Interfaces](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1TT6vrtFEBw978eQbAbDNOt_WKXqYurn7)

# 

# **\--Darfaries Interface Language--**

A Logographic Language created by the ancient species, as Darfaries could not use their interfaces

It is divided into two sections:

# **Subject**

The target of the Soul Energy. See [Soul Energy Interfaces](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1TT6vrtFEBw978eQbAbDNOt_WKXqYurn7)

# **Verb**

Interface action. See [Soul Energy Interfaces](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1TT6vrtFEBw978eQbAbDNOt_WKXqYurn7)
